title: Your New Year's Resolution For 2023: Invest $10,000 In These 10 Stocks
text: In this article, I review the stocks of ten world-class companies that I either have in my portfolio or am in the process of building a position in. I point out the specifics of the companies' business models, discuss their profitability and balance sheet quality, and evaluate their dividend growth record and future prospects.

text: The fundamentals remain intact for these industry-leading businesses.

title: 10 Best Performing Aerospace and Defense Stocks in 2022
text: Rising geopolitical tensions have made defense stocks a safe bet during such uncertain times.

title: In Times of Conflict, Defense Wins Championships
text: Throughout history, times of war have proven to be a stimulus to defense contractors. Today we will explore which names stand to benefit the most.

title: Spending Increase Rounds Off Good Year for Defense Industry. Raytheon, Lockheed Martin Are Rising.
text: The bill presented by U.S. lawmakers includes $858 billion in military spending, up about 10% from the prior year.

title: Is Raytheon an Excellent Defensive Stock to Buy Right Now?
text: The defense contractor could get a boost from the need to replenish stockpiles.

title: Raytheon: Huge Contract Wins With Huge Ukraine Tailwinds
text: Raytheon is a leading aerospace and defense contractor that owns multiple businesses. The company supplied the Javelin Anti-Tank missile launcher, which has proven to be extremely effective and thus popular in the Ukraine.

title: Raytheon: Winning During The War
text: Raytheon Technologies Corporation has been awarded many contracts during the war between Ukraine and Russia. In less than a month, Raytheon has won contracts worth more than $2B. The company announced a large share repurchase program worth $6B, representing a 4% buyback yield. The share repurchases should drive Raytheon stock price higher.

title: 3 Companies Recently Unveiling New Buyback Programs
text: In the face of a challenging economic backdrop in 2022, companies willing to dish out extra cash can be hard to find.

title: Goldman doubles down on call for investors to shun industrials stocks despite their dazzling 4th-quarter performance
text: Goldman Sachs Group is recommending that their clients shun industrials stocks despite the sector's stellar 18% rally since the start of the fourth quarter, according to a recent note from David Kostin, the investment bank's top equity strategist.

title: Raytheon (RTX) Wins Deal to Supply F135 Propulsion System Parts
text: Raytheon (RTX) is set to supply long-lead materials, parts and components for the 17th lot's F135 propulsion systems to support the F-35 Lighting II Joint Strike Fighter aircraft.

title: Raytheon Technologies demonstrates FlexLink Adaptive Connectivity Solution in support of U.S. Army's Project Convergence
text: Exercise successfully demonstrated a range of JADC2 capabilities ARLINGTON, Va. , Dec. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Raytheon Technologies (NYSE: RTX) successfully demonstrated solutions needed to connect defense networks and simplify U.S. Army command and control systems during the Army's Project Convergence exercise.

title: Lockheed Martin, Other U.S. Defense Giants, Court Vietnam
text: Lockheed Martin, Raytheon and Boeing are among the U.S. defense firms courting new deals with Vietnam as it seeks less reliance on Russia. The post Lockheed Martin, Other U.S. Defense Giants, Court Vietnam appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Raytheon announces $6 billion buyback program
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp. RTX, +1.31% announced Monday afternoon that its board of directors has authorized a stock-buyback program of up to $6 billion. The program replaces Raytheon's previous one, which was approved Dec. 7, 2021.

title: Raytheon Technologies Board of Directors Authorizes $6 Billion Share Repurchase Program
text: ARLINGTON, Va. , Dec. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Raytheon Technologies' (NYSE: RTX) Board of Directors authorized today the repurchase of up to $6 billion of the company's outstanding common stock.

title: Raytheon Is An Industry Leader With Strong Fundamentals And Promising Opportunities
text: Raytheon is a leading defense contractor with very solid fundamentals and a long track record. Shares of Raytheon are trading for what I believe to be a decent valuation.

title: RTX Ventures invests in EpiSci to further develop next generation autonomy solutions
text: ARLINGTON, Va. , Dec. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- RTX Ventures, the venture capital arm of Raytheon Technologies (NYSE: RTX), has made a minority investment in autonomous solutions company EpiSci.

title: Pratt & Whitney Awarded F135 Engine Core Upgrade Contract
text: EAST HARTFORD, Conn. , Dec. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Pratt & Whitney, a Raytheon Technologies (NYSE: RTX) business, has won a $115 million contract for the F135 engine enhancement effort, also referred to as an engine core upgrade.
